name: Dell Precision: Performance and Reliability for Workstation Class Applications (Q2 FY04)
description: Dell confidential (NDA) Q2 FY04 launch briefing for the new Dell Precision 370/470/670 workstation line. Documents adoption of DDR2 memory, PCI Express graphics/IO, integrated SATA RAID, and Intel EM64T 64-bit extensions on Xeon and Pentium 4 CPUs. Positioned as a low-risk, standards-based evolutionary path to 64-bit workstation computing.

creator.name: Dell Inc. (provided to Aberdeen Group under NDA)
